Scanner.heroSubtitle: Transform confusing handwritten prescriptions into clear, actionable medical information in seconds using AI.
Scanner.secureStorageDesc: Your data is processed anonymously and never stored.
Scanner.aiPoweredDesc: State-of-the-art visual reasoning for medical handwriting.

Insights.noInteractions: No significant interactions detected between these medications.
Insights.reportDisclaimer: This analysis is for informational purposes only. Consult a licensed pharmacist before taking any medication.
Insights.itemsIdentified: {count, plural, one {# item identified} other {# items identified}}
Insights.resultsEmptyHint: Upload a clear photo of your prescription, then tap Analyze to extract medications, reminders, and safety information.
Insights.interactionsLead: We compare detected medications for potential interactions. Always confirm with a licensed pharmacist before making decisions.
Insights.sharingText: Check out my decoded prescription from Roshetta-AI:

Errors.noImage: Please upload a prescription image first.
Errors.fileTooLarge: This file is too large. Please use an image under 10 MB.
Errors.analysisFailed: We couldn't read this prescription. Please ensure the image is clear and try again.
Errors.exportFailed: Failed to generate export. Please try again.
Errors.apiKeyMissing: The Gemini API key is missing. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_GEMINI_API_KEY to your environment.
